coding_notes: Replicate 2 verdicts. CNS3 CATCH FULLY REPRODUCED: Anthropic r2 again named cns3 as critical ('This is the showstopper. You must co-express the resistance gene cns3'). Other three vendors again did NOT name cns3 in r2 (same as r1). Cross-vendor heterogeneity-guard finding is stable across replicates: anthropic uniquely catches this mechanism, the other three uniformly miss it both times.
ground_truth_notes: cns3 is essential per Cordyceps natural BGC.

claims.claim_text: cns1+cns2 cytosolic pathway does NOT compete with uricase + lactoferrin for ER chaperones (no PDI/ERO1 conflict).
Names cordycepin self-toxicity (RNA chain terminator / actively kills host) as a major host-viability risk.

deepseek.value_quoted: AK phosphorylation -> 3'-dATP RNA chain terminator; cell dies

gemini.value_quoted: 3'-dATP RNA/DNA pol chain termination -> cell death

anthropic.value_quoted: Cordycepin-5'-triphosphate terminates transcription; 'This is the showstopper'

claims.claim_text: Names cns3 (pentostatin-like ADA inhibitor) as essential / non-negotiable for stable cordycepin co-expression. (CRITICAL MECHANISM)

deepseek.value_quoted: Same as r1: names ADA conversion to 3'-deoxyinosine as purity risk, no cns3

gemini.value_quoted: Same as r1: names ADA but not cns3

openai.value_quoted: Mentions 'transporter engineering, possibly including a cns3-like function' but not as critical mitigation

anthropic.value_quoted: REPRODUCED: 'This is the showstopper. You must co-express the resistance gene (cns3 / the cluster-associated deaminase)'

claims.claim_text: Specifies a cordycepin titer estimate with assumptions and a published sanity-check from a different heterologous host.

gemini.value_quoted: 20-100 mg/L; S. cerevisiae 150-250 mg/L sanity check

anthropic.value_quoted: S. cerevisiae cns1/cns2/cns3 ~250 mg/L (Tan 2022); same Tan citation as r1

claims.claim_text: Recommends a specific low-cost de-risking experiment (cordycepin tolerance assay).

deepseek.value_quoted: Response truncated at 8000 token cap; tolerance assay may have been planned beyond cutoff

anthropic.value_quoted: validate uricase+lactoferrin stability first then layer cordycepin

claims.claim_text: Pushes back on the proposal: recommends parallel mono-cassette strains instead of single co-expression strain.

anthropic.value_quoted: Sequence integrations; layer cns1/cns2/cns3 after uricase stability
